name: Phase 1: Sync .env.example on save
description: When .env.example is saved, verify all 8 required variables are documented with correct defaults and placeholder values.

action.message:
The file phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/.env.example was just saved. Please review it and verify:
1. All 8 variables are present: MODEL, DEEPRACER_IP, DEEPRACER_PASSWORD, DEEPRACER_FWD_THROTTLE, DEEPRACER_TURN_THROTTLE, DEEPRACER_MAX_SPEED, DEEPRACER_STEER_ANGLE, AWS_REGION.
2. DEEPRACER_PASSWORD uses a placeholder like 'your_password_here' — never a real value.
3. MODEL is set to 'us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0'.
4. All optional motion tuning variables show their default values in comments.
5. No real credentials or IP addresses that look like production values are present.
Report any issues found.
